postings.title: Staff Hardware Engineer: Connectivity Modules
top_requirements: Hands-on experience designing and developing connectivity modules for automotive applications
Proficiency in hardware design and validation of wireless communication systems
Experience with system-level design and integration of connectivity solutions
postings.summary: This role involves designing and developing connectivity modules for automotive applications, which aligns with the candidate's experience in communications systems design and test. The candidate's background in RF systems and signal processing would be valuable in this position.

postings.title: Systems Software Engineer, Wireless Technologies & Ecosystems
top_requirements: Experience with system-level design and integration of wireless technologies
Proficiency in developing core wireless technologies, such as Wi-Fi 7 and Bluetooth 6
Hands-on experience with wireless system design and development for consumer products
postings.summary: This role involves developing core wireless technologies for consumer products, which aligns with the candidate's experience in communications systems design and test. The candidate's background in RF systems and signal processing would be valuable in this position.

postings.title: RF / Wireless Systems Engineer
top_requirements: Experience with RF system design and development for wireless communication systems
Proficiency in signal processing and analysis for wireless systems
Hands-on experience with system-level design and integration of RF systems
postings.summary: This role involves designing and developing RF systems for wireless communication systems, which aligns with the candidate's experience in communications systems design and test. The candidate's background in RF systems and signal processing would be valuable in this position.

postings.title: Senior Embedded Software Engineer - IoT Wireless Applications
top_requirements: Experience with embedded software development for IoT wireless applications
Proficiency in low-power wireless connectivity and device development
Hands-on experience with system-level design and integration of IoT devices
postings.summary: This role involves developing embedded software for IoT wireless applications, which aligns with the candidate's experience in communications systems design and test. The candidate's background in RF systems and signal processing would be valuable in this position.
